feedback.text: Hello Digital Fairness Act, As a buyer im and we have big problems about Gaming industry and specialy EDITORS, we need your full support into "Stop Destroying Videogames" aka Stop Killing Games Cityzen initiative for protecting our games and for what we paid for ! The actual situation are worst than ever, as a buyer you can off course buy alot of games created by Developper and Released by thes Evil Editor, but we do not have any protection against Games we paid for behing closed, killed, closed server, that make our product not working anymore, and supporting "SDV" Cityzen Initiative will grant us a chance to have right and protection against this scams we facing for. The law project already have alot of resolving situation that not cost million dollar to proceed, because thes solution are extremely simple, make thes games ( Online Service - P2P - Dedicated - ect) Playable after End of life of the game by patch from devs that provide Offline Patch that lets you play the game after server shutdown or something that require an internet connection to the server, developpers already have thes source code then they can do it, but only by order of the Editor off course, and thes Project Law, will give us a protection against this evil editor selling us game and 2 or 5 years after they shutting down server without providing offline Patch, they taked our money for physical Copy and digitals copy of a game, and after that shutdown the game you have are totaly unusable, and against that we do not have any protection against that, for the Editor its totaly nothing to just order on Developpers to release an offline patch that process take maximum 1 week to remove server dependency and make the game able to be runned and played offline - Lan - P2P And without your support that situation can be much worst in the future, actualy im not buying any game from company like Ubisoft, and Editor that making this bad Gesture .. The main objectiv are simple, make thes Online Service game or game require Online Connection after End Of Life of the Game, to make law that Rule Gaming industry against thes awful pratics and give us protection about it !! We paid a game and that games are like a product you paid, you buy something you use and for what ever you buy, we should have a protection with it, and thes game made by thes exploited developpers and giving to us incredible art of creation, giving us Fun, enjoyement, and owesome storys, and thes artistics creation must be preserved and used, like when you go into a museum to see what past engineer, builders do in the past, we must have access for what we paid and we should not fight like we fight know to obtain that legitimate request Please Support US, Support Stop Destroying Games, Be a part of this necessary Initiative
